comment_text:
I wanna know more abt this world!😭🙏

What’s the full backstory of Rumi and her demon powers?

Who is Kima? Can he be Rumi’s grandpa? father? Uncle? Why can't he control Rumi ?

Who is Rumi’s demon father, and what are his true intentions?
 
Did Jinu really die? Will he come back in a sequel?

How does the Honmoon barrier work—and is it failing?

Will there be a "K‑Pop Demon Hunters 2"?

What happened to the rest of the Saja Boys after the final battle?

Are there more demon threats outside Korea?

Will Huntrix and Saja Boys unite again in future missions?

What’s the deeper mythology behind demons and idols?

Who are the members of Huntr/x and what are their pasts?

Why is music so powerful against demons in this world?

What’s the significance of the glowing tattoos and stage gear?

 Could this become a full series?

 Where do the demons come from? The movie doesn’t fully explain the origin of demons. Are they supernatural, spiritual, or cursed former humans? Is there a demonic hierarchy or king behind everything?

What is the connection between demons and K-pop music. Why does music have the power to fight or weaken demons? Does music attract demons—or does it purify them? Why are K-pop idols the chosen ones to hunt demons?

How does the demon world work? Is there a separate demonic dimension or are the demons hiding in the human world? Can humans go to the demon realm? Will we see it in a sequel?

What is Rumi’s demonic heritage? Rumi is half-demon, but who exactly was her father? What are the limits of her powers—and can she be consumed by her demon side?

Why is Seoul a demon hotspot? Why are demons mostly attacking Seoul/K-pop groups? Is there some hidden energy or sacred power site in the city that draws demonic forces?

Are the demons intelligent or just monsters? Some demons seem smart, like Jinu. Are they evil masterminds or just corrupted beings? Can they regain humanity, or are they all doomed?

What exactly was Jinu? Jinu is the demon boyband leader—was he once human? Why was he more powerful or charismatic than other demons?

What powers do demons have—and how are they defeated? Some demons shapeshift, some control fire or illusions. Is there a common weakness, or is each one unique?
